name: ETD XSOAR Connector
description: Cisco ETD XSOAR Connector fetches Cisco Email Threat Defense message events and creates incidents in Cortex XSOAR. The pack includes incident enrichment, ETD-specific incident fields, and a remediation playbook that allows analysts to reclassify email verdicts and perform remediation actions such as quarantine, inbox, junk, trash, or delete.
author: Cortex XSOAR
